title: All of Create (AOC)
description: A Modpack With Multiply Create Addons
body:
This Modpack aims to redo modded Minecraft with create mod.

Here you can design many things and even cause them to drive or fly.


Most people can either play single player or multiplayer with this modpack. 

Includes: Multiple Create Mod addons Including Valkyrien Skies/ Clock Work, It can be used for a survival or creative playthrough. Also includes the Chipped Mod For Improved Building.

Other
[FrameWork Mod](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/framework/files/5180972)

Enjoy.
